13707.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Fist Weapons by 1%.
13707.name: Fist Weapon Specialization

13709.description: Increases your skill with Maces by 1, and gives you a 1% chance to stun your target for 3 sec with a mace.
13709.name: Mace Specialization

13750.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 100% for 15 sec.
13750.name: Adrenaline Rush

13792.description: Increases the effect duration of your Gouge ability by 1.5 sec.
13792.name: Improved Gouge

13807.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Daggers by 5%.
13807.name: Dagger Specialization

13845.description: Increases your chance to hit with melee weapons by 5%.
13845.name: Precision

13852.description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 50%.
13852.name: Dual Wield Specialization

13863.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Sinister Strike ability by 5.
13863.name: Improved Sinister Strike

13866.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Backstab ability by 30%.
13866.name: Improved Backstab

13867.description: Gives your Kick ability a 100% chance to silence the target for 2 sec.
13867.name: Improved Kick

13872.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sprint and Evasion abilities by 1.5 min.
13872.name: Endurance

13875.description: Gives a 100% chance to remove all movement impairing effects when you activate your Sprint ability.
13875.name: Improved Sprint

13877.description: Increases your attack speed by 20%. In addition, attacks strike an additional nearby opponent. Lasts 15 sec.
13877.name: Blade Flurry

13964.description: Gives you a 5% chance to get an extra attack on the same target after dealing damage with your Sword.
13964.name: Sword Specialization

13973.description: Reduces the chance enemies have to detect you while in Stealth mode. More effective than Master of Deception (Rank 4).
13973.name: Master of Deception

13980.description: Gives you a 75% chance to add an additional combo point to your target when using your Ambush, Garrote, or Cheap Shot ability.
13980.name: Initiative

13983.description: Gives you a 15% chance to add a combo point to your target after dodging their attack or fully resisting one of their spells.
13983.name: Setup

14065.description: Increases your speed while stealthed by 15% and reduces the cooldown of your Stealth ability by 5 sec.
14065.name: Camouflage

14066.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Vanish and Blind abilities by 1.5 min.
14066.name: Elusiveness

14075.description: Increases the damage dealt when striking from behind with your Backstab, Garrote, or Ambush abilities by 20%.
14075.name: Opportunity

14081.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Ambush ability by 45%.
14081.name: Improved Ambush

14083.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Cheap Shot and Garrote abilities by 20.
14083.name: Dirty Deeds

14095.description: Gives you a 90% chance to return to stealth mode after using your Sap ability.
14095.name: Improved Sap

14113.description: Increases the chance to apply poisons to your target by 2%.
14113.name: Improved Poisons

14137.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Sinister Strike, Gouge, Backstab, Ghostly Strike, and Hemorrhage abilities by 30%.
14137.name: Lethality

14142.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 5%.
14142.name: Malice

14144.description: After killing an opponent that yields experience or honor, gives you a 20% increased critical strike chance on your next Sinister Strike, Backstab, Ambush, or Ghostly Strike. Lasts 20 sec.
14144.name: Remorseless Attacks

14159.description: Increases all damage caused against Humanoid, Giant, Beast and Dragonkin targets by 2%.
14159.name: Murder

14161.description: Gives your finishing moves a 60% chance to add a combo point to your target.
14161.name: Ruthlessness

14164.description: Increases the damage done by your Eviscerate ability by 15%.
14164.name: Improved Eviscerate

14167.description: Increases the duration of your Slice and Dice ability by 45%.
14167.name: Improved Slice and Dice

14169.description: Increases the armor reduced by your Expose Armor ability by 50%.
14169.name: Improved Expose Armor

14173.description: Causes your attacks to ignore 0 of your target's Armor and increases the damage dealt by your Rupture ability by 30%. The amount of Armor reduced increases with your level.
14173.name: Serrated Blades

14174.description: While affected by your Kidney Shot ability, the target receives an additional 3% damage from all sources.
14174.name: Improved Kidney Shot

14177.description: When activated, increases the critical strike chance of your next Sinister Strike, Backstab, Ambush, or Eviscerate by 100%.
14177.name: Cold Blood

14179.description: Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point to restore 25 energy.
14179.name: Relentless Strikes

14183.description: When used, adds 2 combo points to your target. You must add to or use those combo points within 10 sec or the combo points are lost.
14183.name: Premeditation

14185.description: When activated, this ability immediately finishes the cooldown on your other Rogue abilities.
14185.name: Preparation

14186.description: Your critical strikes from abilities that add combo points have a 20% chance to add an additional combo point.
14186.name: Seal Fate

14251.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an opponent's attack. This attack deals 150% weapon damage and disarms the target for 6 sec.
14251.name: Riposte

14278.description: A strike that deals 125% weapon damage and increases your chance to dodge by 15% for 7 sec. Awards 1 combo point.
14278.name: Ghostly Strike

16511.description: An instant strike that damages the opponent and causes the target to hemorrhage, increasing any Physical damage dealt to the target by up to 3. Lasts 30 charges or 15 sec. Awards 1 combo point.
16511.name: Hemorrhage

16513.description: Increases the damage dealt by your poisons by 4% and gives your poisons an additional 8% chance to resist dispel effects.
16513.name: Vile Poisons

18429.description: Increases the damage of your Sinister Strike and Eviscerate abilities by 6%.
18429.name: Aggression

30892.description: Reduces the chance you are critically hit by melee and ranged attacks by 1% and increases the threat reduction of your Feint ability by 10%.
30892.name: Sleight of Hand

30895.description: Increases your Stealth detection and reduces the chance you are hit by spells and ranged attacks by 4%. More effective than Heightened Senses (Rank 1).
30895.name: Heightened Senses

30920.description: Increases your skill with Sword, Fist and Dagger weapons by 5.
30920.name: Weapon Expertise
